ddls:
CREATE TABLE "repositories" (
  "repo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each repository */,
  "repo_url" TEXT /* URL of the Git repository */,
  "branch" TEXT /* Current branch of the repository */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the repository was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the repository was last updated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the repository */,
  "visibility" TEXT /* Visibility of the repository (e.g., public, private) */,
  "fork_count" INTEGER /* Number of forks of the repository */,
  "star_count" INTEGER /* Number of stars of the repository */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("repo_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "github_id" TEXT /* GitHub ID of the author */,
  "display_name" TEXT /* Display name of the author */,
  "git_author_name" TEXT /* Git author name used in commits */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the author */,
  "contributions" INTEGER /* Total contributions made by the author */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the author registered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "author_repositories" (
  "author_repo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the author-repository association */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author */,
  "repo_id" INTEGER /* ID of the repository */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the author in the repository (e.g., owner, collaborator) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_repo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_author_repositories_repo_id FOREIGN KEY ("repo_id") REFERENCES repositories ("repo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_author_repositories_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "commits" (
  "commit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each commit */,
  "repo_id" INTEGER /* ID of the repository where the commit was made */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author who made the commit */,
  "commit_date" TEXT /* Date when the commit was made */,
  "commit_message" TEXT /* Message associated with the commit */,
  "commit_hash" TEXT /* Hash of the commit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("commit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_commits_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_commits_repo_id FOREIGN KEY ("repo_id") REFERENCES repositories ("repo_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "branches" (
  "branch_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each branch */,
  "repo_id" INTEGER /* ID of the repository the branch belongs to */,
  "branch_name" TEXT /* Name of the branch */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the branch was created */,
  "default_branch" INTEGER /* Whether the branch is the default branch */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("branch_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_branches_repo_id FOREIGN KEY ("repo_id") REFERENCES repositories ("repo_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "commit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the commit the tag is associated with */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "tag_description" TEXT /* Description of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tags_commit_id FOREIGN KEY ("commit_id") REFERENCES commits ("commit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "issues" (
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each issue */,
  "repo_id" INTEGER /* ID of the repository the issue is associated with */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the issue */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the issue */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the issue was created */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the issue (e.g., open, closed) */,
  "assignee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author assigned to the issue */,
  "labels" TEXT /* Labels associated with the issue */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("issue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issues_repo_id FOREIGN KEY ("repo_id") REFERENCES repositories ("repo_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "issue_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the issue the comment is associated with */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author who made the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date when the comment was made */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text content of the comment */,
  "edited" INTEGER /* Whether the comment has been edited */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issue_comments_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issue_comments_issue_id FOREIGN KEY ("issue_id") REFERENCES issues ("issue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pull_requests" (
  "pr_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pull request */,
  "repo_id" INTEGER /* ID of the repository the pull request is associated with */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the pull request */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the pull request */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author who submitted the pull request */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the pull request was created */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the pull request (e.g., open, merged, closed) */,
  "target_branch" TEXT /* Target branch of the pull request */,
  "source_branch" TEXT /* Source branch of the pull request */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pr_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pull_requests_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pull_requests_repo_id FOREIGN KEY ("repo_id") REFERENCES repositories ("repo_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pr_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "pr_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pull request the comment is associated with */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author who made the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date when the comment was made */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text content of the comment */,
  "edited" INTEGER /* Whether the comment has been edited */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pr_comments_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pr_comments_pr_id FOREIGN KEY ("pr_id") REFERENCES pull_requests ("pr_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ignore_glob_lists" (
  "glob_list_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ignore glob list */,
  "repo_id" INTEGER /* ID of the repository the glob list is associated with */,
  "glob_pattern" TEXT /* Glob pattern to be ignored */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the glob pattern */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("glob_list_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ignore_glob_lists_repo_id FOREIGN KEY ("repo_id") REFERENCES repositories ("repo_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, tester, admin) */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "repo_id" INTEGER /* ID of the repository being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the repository */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the repository was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, clone, push) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_repo_id FOREIGN KEY ("repo_id") REFERENCES repositories ("repo_id")
)
